entry.title: 2026-06-05_Project
entry.summary: Please find your project grades below. The project grade accounts for 50% of your final course grade. The final grade for the course will be calculated as the average of your theoretical exam grade and your project grade.

entry.title: 2026-06-05_Exam
entry.summary: Please find your theoretical exam results below. A minimum score of 50% was required to pass the exam. The grade obtained on the theoretical exam accounts for 50% of your final course grade.

entry.title: 2024-06-06_končna_ocena
entry.summary: Here are the final score of the Early Robotics course. Please sign in [our sistem](https://vispef.uni-lj.si/) to get your score officialy confirmed.

entry.title: 2024-06-06_teorija-izpit
entry.summary: Congratulation, You have all pass the exam. There are your scores...

entry.title: RSS SPOROČILA
entry.summary: The purpose of these notifications is to inform you about a new post in your notification reader. This way, you won't need to manually check for updates and follow new posts. You can subscribe to notifications by linking to this RSS feed. You can read them with any RSS client (e.g., Feedly), and some email clients also support reading them (e.g., Thunderbird).
